title: SWMMCanada: ready-to-run EPA SWMM models anywhere in Canada from open data
description: SWMMCanada turns a boundary drawn (or uploaded) anywhere in Canada into a complete, ready-to-run EPA SWMM stormwater model. It pulls Canadian open data for the area (rainfall, terrain, land cover, soil, and municipal storm networks) and assembles a model.inp together with a shareable datastore package (GeoPackage + netCDF + JSON). It is the upstream model-building service for the Agentic SWMM workflow.
